quality.description: Code quality agents: review, test, refactor, security

ops.description: Operations agents: dependency audit, migration planning, documentation

hooks.command: fp=$(cat | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$fp" ] && exit 0; case "$fp" in *.py) if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix "$fp" 2>/dev/null; else echo '[hook] ruff not found — install with: uv tool install ruff' >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
which osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs attention" with title "Claude Code"' || true
